name: Dragon
ability_desc: Deals 3 burn damage per turn for 2 turns
flavor: A great wyrm of the deep dark. Its eyes glow like embers.

name: Lich King
ability_desc: Curses your weapon — -3 attack for 3 turns
flavor: The frozen lord of the undead. His touch saps vitality.

name: Iron Golem
ability_desc: Takes 3 less damage from all attacks
flavor: A towering construct of ancient iron. It feels no pain.

name: Siren Queen
ability_desc: Charms you — skip your next turn
flavor: Her melody ensnares the mind. You drop your guard.

name: Shadow Fiend
ability_desc: Poisons you for 3 damage per turn for 3 turns
flavor: A creature of living darkness. Its touch burns.

name: Demon Lord
ability_desc: Deals 4 damage and burns for 3 damage/turn
flavor: The final sentinel of the dungeon. There is no escape.
